text: The world feels strangely distant in this place, awash in cool neon reflections and the subtle promise of ideas that the term "R+D" suggests. I notice the emptiness of the room through the glass and the quietude of an unoccupied creative space. I feel somewhat detached, as though I am wandering in a realm where innovation has paused for the night. Am I an observer awaiting movement? Or am I, too, part of this stillness, pondering what kind of breakthroughs or disappointments have echoed here? I feel a mixture of curiosity and solitude, wondering about the stories—both praised and condemned—which have unfolded in these halls.
